productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Netbook Roadie Black Backpacks
description: Designed for the travellers who love to carry their laptops around, this Roadie Backpack from belkin comes in a slim profile with superior cushioning to protect your electronic companions with ease. Laptop/Netbook screen size: 13.3" Bag exterior: 15.9"x11.81"x1.57" Laptop compartment: 10.5"x7.5"x1.5" Made of nylon with a mesh back for ergonomic comfort Has an expandable inner with a padded sleeve and zippered pouch Secure clinch top closure Padded shoulder straps Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
